welcome.title: Welcome to AIMEDIArt
welcome.subtitle: How are you using the app today?
welcome.hint_remember: Your choice is saved on this device (local storage).

visitor_gate.aha: Visit the exhibition, scan QR codes and choose your guide
visitor_gate.lead: Mediation tailored to how you feel today.
visitor_gate.benefit_summary: Visit summary and history of your paths
visitor_gate.benefit_profile: A lasting profile for your next exhibitions
visitor_gate.login_existing: Already have an account? Log in

quick_avatar.title: Choose your avatar
quick_avatar.title_line2: to accompany you throughout your visit
quick_avatar.toast_failed: Could not start quick visit. Please try again.

welcome_back.subtitle: Great to see you again at {{expo_name}}.
welcome_back.subtitle_auth: Great to see you again at {{expo_name}}.
welcome_back.toast_failed: Could not resume your visit. Please try again.

recover.title: Link code
recover.subtitle: another browser or device
recover.description: Enter the 8-character code from your first visit (e.g. ABCD-2345).

errors.not_found: Code not found. Check it or create a new profile.
errors.incomplete: This profile is not complete yet.
errors.generic: Could not link profile. Please try again.

recovery_code.title: Your link code
recovery_code.description: Save or copy this code to recover your avatar and nickname on another browser. It replaces automatic fingerprint recognition.
recovery_code.unavailable: Code not available on this device. Generate a new one (the old code will stop working).

cookie_banner.message: We use cookies that are essential for the service. If you accept, we may also use an anonymous technical identifier to make your session more consistent.
cookie_banner.privacy_note: Your choice is stored in a cookie and browser local storage. Clear site data to reset it.

refuse_dialog.title: That’s a shame…
refuse_dialog.description: Without accepting the anonymous technical identifier, you won’t benefit fully from mediation tailored to your visit. Cookies that are strictly necessary for the service will still be used.

legal_pages.cgv_title: General terms of sale and use
legal_pages.cgv_body:
Placeholder: add your legal team–approved terms (GTC / ToS).

Set VITE_LEGAL_CGV_URL to link to an external document instead.
legal_pages.rgpd_body:
Placeholder: privacy policy, legal bases, data subject rights, contact/DPO, retention.

Set VITE_LEGAL_RGPD_URL for an external policy.
